A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving the quote (query_db on sales_pipeline) and all knowledge articles (query_db on support.knowledge__kav), the agent used a heuristic execute_python step that matched generic phrases like “TCO and ROI” and “complexities in implementation” in article text instead of verifying the quote’s cost/setup against policy, leading it to return ka0Wt000000EowFIAS rather than the correct policy article.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
